Application Requirements

MENU

For HSK levels 3, 4, 5, and 6, participation in the corresponding HSKK exam held on the same day is mandatory. For HSK levels 1 and 2, there is no requirement to take the oral exam.

For HSK 3, participating the

HSKK BASIC

level is required.

For HSK 4, participating the

HSKK INTERMEDIATE

level is required.

For HSK 5 and 6, participating  the

HSKK ADVANCED

level is required.

If you want, you can participate in any HSKK exam alone. HSK exams are not mandatory for HSKK exams.

Click for the Application Form.
